headline: Amazon Seals Delivery Deal With USPS. How UPS And FedEx Shares Are Reacting.
summary: Amazon and the U.S. Postal Service have a parcel delivery in plan in place that will see a 20% reduction in package volumes. FedEx and UPS stock both fell around 1% on Monday.

raw.headline: Amazon Seals Delivery Deal With USPS. How UPS And FedEx Shares Are Reacting.
raw.summary: Amazon and the U.S. Postal Service have a parcel delivery in plan in place that will see a 20% reduction in package volumes. FedEx and UPS stock both fell around 1% on Monday.

headline: Teamsters Secure UPS Buyout Cap; NLRB Calls Amazon to the Bargaining Table
summary: UPS and the union settled their dispute over a driver separation program, limiting the total voluntary buyouts to 7,500 employees.

headline: How UPS is using AI, from shipper pricing to customs clearance
summary: As the carrier embraces AI and data analytics across its operations, it's training employees on how to better wield new technologies, a UPS executive said.

headline: New Ownership of PostalAnnex in Kerman, California Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Serving the Community with Shipping and Office Services for Nearly 30 Years
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing PostalAnnex location in Kerman, CA to new owner, Helen Shergill-Barandalla. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential Shipping and Office Services provided by this PostalAnnex for nearly 30 years.

headline: UPS sets limits on driver buyouts in deal with Teamsters union
summary: The carrier has agreed to cap the number of buyout payments to 7,500 drivers under a program it says has received "strong interest across the country."

headline: UPS to cap driver buyouts at 7,500 after Teamster pushback
summary: Under strong pressure from the Teamsters union, UPS has agreed to limit how many drivers it eliminates through an early-retirement program The post UPS to cap driver buyouts at 7,500 after Teamster pushback appeared first on FreightWaves.
